location: Looted from a body inside the Leyndell, Royal Capital colosseum (added by the free Colosseum update). From West Capital Rampart grace, head south past the giant tree branches up into the colosseum structure; the body is in the last opening on the left side.
tactics: Two Duelist NPCs patrol the approach to the colosseum — sneak past or fight them one at a time rather than pulling both at once.
The same pickup also exists in the late-game "Leyndell, Ashen Capital" version of the map, in case you miss it the first time through.
Don't confuse with the visually similar Spiked Caestus — Star Fist hits harder but builds less blood loss.
lore: A spiked iron hand-wrap built for brutal pugilist duels, its spikes meant to open cuts and cause blood loss with every punch.

builds.name: Strength bleed brawler
builds.why: Among the highest raw physical output of the base-game fist weapons, plus built-in blood loss buildup, fits a Strength-forward bleed build.
